description_long: This is a three-seater sofa upholstered in a deep burgundy or dark red material with a subtle, fine-grained texture. The sofa features three seat cushions and three backrest cushions, all of which appear to be attached and uniformly sized, providing a clean and structured look. The armrests are straight, blocky, and padded, extending from the seat base to the height of the backrest, giving the sofa a modern and robust appearance. The base of the sofa is solid and boxy, with no visible legs, suggesting a hidden or recessed leg design. The upholstery has a faint, almost woodgrain-like pattern, adding a touch of visual interest to the otherwise solid color. Overall, the sofa exudes a contemporary, urban style suitable for public or semi-public spaces.
description: A modern, burgundy three-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, attached cushions, and a subtle textured pattern. The design is boxy and solid, with no visible legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and the full width of the sofa.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the blocky armrest, the thickness of the backrest, and the solid base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken back panel and the sofa's boxy silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and backrest profile, emphasizing the sofa's depth and solid construction.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached seat cushions and three attached back cushions, all uniform in size and evenly spaced across the sofa.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, block-style armrests that are padded and extend from the seat base to the height of the backrest, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the sofa appears to have a solid, box-style base, suggesting hidden or recessed support.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with three attached, uniform cushions forming a continuous line.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Subtle, fine-grained texture resembling a faint woodgrain or linear pattern, with a matte finish and no visible decorative stitching.
